_comment: Canned but coherent Ollama /api/chat reply, shaped like a real one.

message.content: New: switch-access-07 reports Gi1/0/24 link down (High). Likely impact: the devices behind that access port lost connectivity; if it feeds an AP or a phone bank, expect partial WiFi/telephony degradation on that segment. Scope is limited — no core or uplink alarm alongside it. First look: check whether Gi1/0/24 is an uplink or an edge port and confirm the peer device is powered; if it is PoE, verify the power budget on switch-access-07.
